fix.item: Added update server support to the plugin manifest.
Added changelog URL support to the plugin manifest.
Added a GPL-compatible license header to the main plugin class.
Improved Turkish administrator translations for the API key field and About tab.
Renamed the basic settings fieldset label to Plugin Settings.

note.item: Update the GitHub URLs if you use a different repository name or release path.
The checksum values in update.xml match the ZIP package generated for version 0.1.6.

addition.item: Added a new About fieldset to the plugin configuration.
Added usage notes and support information to the plugin settings screen.
